flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Tri-County Technical College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.3k → $11.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Tri-County Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
